sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Aecom builds Singapore’s first AI-enabled sustainable design optioneering ecosystem
feed.summary: Aecom has developed Singapore's first AI-enabled sustainable design optioneering ecosystem, a suite of tools and workflows that reshape infrastructure project design decisions. The system, comprising ScopeX and AecomZero, integrates carbon, cost, and performance considerations early in the design phase, allowing for multi-objective optimization and real-time feedback on numerous design permutations. This approach aims to enhance transparency, reduce late-stage redesigns, combat greenwashing, and can potentially deliver up to 45% carbon reductions.

feed.title: RAAQ (RAAQ) and IQM move SPAC merger forward with confidential Form F-4 submission
feed.summary: Real Asset Acquisition Corp. (RAAQ) and IQM Finland Oy announced that IQM has confidentially submitted a draft Form F-4 registration statement to the SEC, advancing their business combination. This filing is a significant step towards IQM becoming a publicly traded company. The process will involve a preliminary proxy statement for RAAQ and a prospectus for IQM, with shareholder approval required at an Extraordinary General Meeting after SEC effectiveness.

feed.title: Alibaba (BABA) and China Telecom Launch AI Data Center with Homegrown Chips
feed.summary: Alibaba and China Telecom have partnered to launch a new AI data center in southern China, utilizing Alibaba's proprietary Zhenwu semiconductors. This initiative supports China's focus on bolstering its domestic AI infrastructure with homegrown chips, accommodating large AI models. Despite mixed financial performance and insider selling, Alibaba maintains a stable financial position and cautiously optimistic analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Intuitive Surgical(ISRG.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $609
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reaffirmed its Buy rating on Intuitive Surgical (ISRG.US) but has lowered its price target for the stock to $609. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook from the investment bank while maintaining a positive long-term view on the company's prospects.

feed.title: Cintas Corp. stock: Beats earnings but shares drop 16%—what it means
feed.summary: Cintas Corp. exceeded its Q3 earnings targets and raised its fiscal 2026 outlook, yet its stock has fallen 16% in the past month, trading near recent lows. This drop, despite strong operational performance and a resilient business model, is likely due to broader market pressures. The article suggests this could represent a buying opportunity for long-term investors in the uniform and facility services leader.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Inc. stock: Why institutional buys signal opportunity now
feed.summary: Yum! Brands Inc. is attracting significant institutional investment, highlighted by Ethos Capital's new $1.37 million position, signaling strong confidence in the company despite a competitive market. The franchise-focused model, global reach, steady dividends, and positive analyst consensus suggest a compelling investment opportunity. Investors are advised to watch for the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings on April 29 for further insights into its sustained momentum.

feed.title: NRG Energy schedules May 6 earnings call, webcast at 9 a.m. EST
feed.summary: NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The company will host a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. EST (8:00 a.m. CST) to discuss the results. A press release detailing the financial performance will be issued prior to the call and made available on NRG's website.

feed.title: ADP declares quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share, continuing its 27-year track record of dividend increases. The dividend is payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued, and the company has recently seen positive analyst coverage and strong private sector job growth data.

feed.title: Cosette acquires seven branded drugs from Assertio for $48.9M By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cosette Pharmaceuticals has acquired the U.S. sales and distribution rights for seven branded products from Assertio Holdings for $48.9 million. The portfolio generated significant net sales in 2025 and includes SYMPAZAN, an FDA-approved treatment for Lennox-Gastaut Syndrome with patent protection until 2040. This acquisition expands Cosette's branded portfolio and aligns with Assertio's strategic refocusing, which recently included an agreement to be acquired by Garda Therapeutics.

feed.title: Argan, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend on Common Share, Payable on April 30, 2026
feed.summary: Argan, Inc. has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per common share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on April 30, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of the close of business on April 22, 2026. This declaration follows shortly after news of the company boosting its share repurchase program, indicating a commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ:COST) Trading 1.7% Higher - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale (NASDAQ:COST) shares were trading 1.7% higher midday on Wednesday, reaching around $1,030. The stock has a "Moderate Buy" consensus from Wall Street analysts with an average price target of $1,039.13. Key growth drivers include innovations like sub-10-second checkout, private-label energy drinks, and new club openings, but its premium valuation and modest dividend yield raise concerns if growth decelerates.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Shares Up 3.6% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) saw its shares jump 3.6% on Wednesday, with CEO Jamie Dimon pointing to expansion into prediction markets and blockchain/AI opportunities, including Argentine banks piloting JPM Coin. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus despite recent target trims, with Q1 earnings due on April 14th posing near-term event risk. Insider transactions and institutional holdings information are also detailed in the article.

feed.title: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) Trading Up 5.6% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) shares were up 5.6% during mid-day trading on Wednesday, closing at $12.1680. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue, though revenue saw a slight year-over-year decrease. Multiple analysts have raised their price targets for Ford, and insider William Clay Ford Jr. recently increased his stake in the company by purchasing 140,000 shares.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Co stock: What you should know now amid analyst adjustments
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Co (NYSE: CL) continues to offer stability and reliable dividends, despite recent analyst adjustments to price targets due to macro uncertainty. The company's diverse portfolio, strong global presence in oral care, personal care, home care, and a growing pet nutrition segment (Hill's) contribute to consistent cash flows and a 36-year dividend increase streak. While facing headwinds like elevated input costs and North America slowdowns, its robust margins and strategic pricing power maintain profitability, making it attractive for long-term, income-focused investors.

feed.title: International Paper Co stock: What investors should know ahead of Q1 earnings
feed.summary: International Paper Co (NYSE: IP) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 30, with analysts projecting an EPS of $0.23, matching the previous year. The company, a major player in fiber-based packaging, faces opportunities in e-commerce growth and sustainable materials but also challenges from raw material costs and market volatility. Investors are advised to monitor volume growth, cost controls, and the upcoming earnings report for signs of recovery and long-term value.

feed.title: Applied Digital Reports Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Applied Digital announced strong financial results for its fiscal third quarter 2026, with a 139% increase in total revenues to $126.6 million, driven by its HPC Hosting business. The company is significantly expanding its data center operations, breaking ground on a 430 MW AI Factory campus in the southern U.S. and securing $2.15 billion for its Polaris Forge 2 project in North Dakota. These expansions highlight Applied Digital's strategy to meet the surging demand for high-performance computing and AI infrastructure from hyperscale customers.

feed.title: Caterpillar Elects New Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. has announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Andrew Bonfield, will retire on October 1, 2026, after eight years with the company. Kyle Epley, a longtime Caterpillar veteran, has been named his successor, effective May 1, 2026. This leadership transition aims to ensure continuity in financial leadership following a period of record financial performance for the company.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $2,563,000 Uncapped Digital Barrier Notes linked to the lesser performing of the Russell 2000® Index and the S&P 500® Index, due April 11, 2029. These notes, which offer uncapped exposure to index appreciation with a contingent minimum return of 43.10%, are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. Investors face the risk of losing principal if either index falls below its barrier amount, and the notes do not pay interest or dividends.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Updates Financial Reporting and Segment Presentation
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has updated its financial reporting and segment presentation, effective January 1, 2026, to better align with how it manages its businesses. These reclassifications, which include moving Impact Finance and small business credit cards, aim to provide clearer insight into segment economics and risk profiles without altering historical earnings or key metrics. An analyst rating on USB stock is a Sell with a $58.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates USB as Neutral, citing improving profitability and constructive forward guidance tempered by weak technical momentum.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $1.51
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share, payable on May 19th to shareholders of record on April 20th. This represents an annualized dividend of $6.04 and a yield of 0.8%, with the company having increased its dividend for 30 consecutive years. The announcement follows strong Q4 earnings, where Caterpillar reported $5.16 EPS and $19.13 billion in revenue, both exceeding analyst expectations.

feed.title: [8-K/A] AQUABOUNTY TECHNOLOGIES INC Amends Material Event Report
feed.summary: AquaBounty Technologies, Inc. (AQB) has filed an amendment to a prior 8-K report, clarifying that a recent securities offering has brought the company into compliance with Nasdaq's continued listing requirements. Specifically, AquaBounty believes it now satisfies the Equity Standard under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1), which mandates at least $2.5 million in stockholders' equity. This amendment adds an Item 8.01 disclosure without altering other parts of the original report, mitigating immediate delisting risk.

feed.title: Adecoagro SA stock: What investors need to know in volatile ag markets
feed.summary: Adecoagro SA offers investors exposure to South American agriculture, including crop production, sugar, ethanol, and dairy, across Argentina, Brazil, and Uruguay. Despite a strong rise over the past year and diversified revenue streams, recent analyst consensus leans towards a "Strong Sell" due to commodity price volatility, political risks, and climate events. Investors are advised to exercise caution and monitor key indicators before making a move.

feed.title: Cooper Companies shareholders elect directors and approve proposals at annual meeting
feed.summary: Cooper Companies (NASDAQ:COO) shareholders have elected nine directors and approved several proposals at their 2026 Annual Meeting. Key approvals included the ratification of KPMG LLP as the company’s independent accounting firm for fiscal year 2026 and an advisory resolution on executive compensation. This news follows a recent strong first-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings report where the company beat EPS expectations and raised its full-year guidance, though stock performance showed mixed reactions.

feed.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Sets May 8 Date for Q1 2026 Results and Earnings Call
feed.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities (TSE:AQN) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 8, 2026, before markets open. A conference call and webcast with CEO Rod West and CFO Rob Stefani will follow at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time to discuss the results. An analyst rating indicates a Buy with a C$10.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AQN as Neutral due to financial quality and technical momentum concerns,

feed.title: Gilead's Commitment to Bridging the Unmet HIV Treatment Gap
feed.summary: Gilead is dedicated to closing the unmet HIV treatment gap through continued scientific innovation and adaptable care strategies. The article highlights patient stories, like Carla Bailey's and Jeff Berry's, demonstrating the transformative impact of treatment advances while underscoring the ongoing need for diverse and individualized approaches to achieve long-term viral suppression. Researchers at Gilead remain committed to discovering new treatment options to end the HIV epidemic.

feed.title: CF Industries (CF) senior vice president becomes reporting insider on Form 3
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. announced that Trevor Leigh Williams, Sr. VP, Manufacturing & Distribution, has become a reporting insider as indicated by a Form 3 filing. This initial statement of beneficial ownership reports no share transactions or option exercises but signifies his status for future insider trading disclosures. The filing includes details of the Form 3, such as the reporting person's address, the event date, and his role as an officer.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) director receives new deferred stock unit grant
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams director Michael H. Thaman received a grant of 106.97 deferred stock units under the 2005 Director Deferred Fee Plan, with each unit valued at $315.50. These units are an equity-based compensation and are economically equivalent to one share of common stock, to be settled in stock generally after his departure from the board. Following this transaction, Thaman indirectly holds 5,601.56 deferred stock units and directly holds 8,111 common-related units, including 1,100 restricted stock units and 7,011 common shares.

feed.title: APA Corporation, Matador Resources, Chord Energy, Core Natural Resources, and Magnolia Oil & Gas Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of APA Corporation, Matador Resources, Chord Energy, Core Natural Resources, and Magnolia Oil & Gas plummeted following President Donald Trump's announcement of a two-week suspension of attacks on Iran. This "double-sided" ceasefire led to a collapse in crude oil prices by removing the "war premium" and shifting the global oil supply outlook from deficit to potential surplus. Investors rotated out of energy-related "inflation hedges" and into growth-oriented sectors, viewing this as a sign that the peak of the energy-driven profit cycle might have passed.

feed.title: FedEx Reaches Tentative Deal with Pilots’ Union After Five Years
feed.summary: FedEx pilots have reached a tentative labor agreement with the company after nearly five years of negotiations. The deal includes significant hourly pay increases, annual raises starting in 2028, and back pay for captains and first officers to compensate for missed raises during the negotiation period.

feed.title: 12 Health Care Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 healthcare stocks that experienced significant movement in Wednesday's after-market trading session. It details both gainers and losers, including companies like Staar Surgical, Healthcare Triangle, and AVITA Medical among those that rose, and Scienture Holdings, Zhengye Biotechnology, and RxSight among those that declined.

feed.title: American Airlines Pilot Delayed Flight Because He Was Stuck at Starbucks
feed.summary: An American Airlines flight was delayed due to a pilot being stuck in a Starbucks line, highlighting the airline's long-standing issue with poor inflight coffee quality. This incident underscores why airlines like United and Delta have invested in premium coffee partnerships to improve customer experience and operational efficiency. American Airlines recently partnered with Lavazza to address this problem, aiming to provide a consistent and high-quality coffee experience for passengers and crew, which is expected to reduce delays caused by crew seeking coffee elsewhere.

feed.title: Exane BNP Paribas downgrades AT&T Inc. (T) to Neutral April 2026
feed.summary: Exane BNP Paribas downgraded AT&T Inc. (T) from Outperform to Neutral on April 8, 2026, leading to a 2.39% intraday stock drop. The downgrade, reported at 07:20 AM ET, signifies limited near-term upside but did not include a new price target. Investors are advised to consider the dividend yield and payout sustainability, while Meyka AI maintains a B+ rating for AT&T, emphasizing earnings, free cash flow, and debt reduction as key catalysts.

feed.title: Pfizer Options Spot-On: On April 8th, 90,399 Contracts Were Traded, With 2.45 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: This article reports on the significant options trading activity for Pfizer (PFE) on April 8th. A total of 90,399 contracts were traded, with a notable open interest of 2.45 million, indicating substantial market attention towards the pharmaceutical giant's stock options.

feed.title: Baosheng Media (BAOS) unit to sell 42.86% Shanxingzhe partnership stake for RMB 15M cash
feed.summary: Baosheng Media Group Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary Beijing Xunhuo E-Commerce Co., Ltd., has agreed to sell its 42.8571% partnership interest in Guangzhou Shanxingzhe Technology Investment Partnership for RMB 15 million in cash. The sale aims to optimize resource allocation and supplement working capital. The payment will be made in three installments, with the transfer of ownership occurring after registration procedures are completed.

feed.title: Aeroméxico flew nearly 2M passengers in March as load factor improved
feed.summary: Aeroméxico reported a 1.4% year-over-year decline in passengers for March 2026, totaling 1.99 million, yet its load factor increased to 83.3% due to demand outpacing capacity. International ASMs and RPMs grew, while domestic figures saw a modest decline, partly attributed to localized disruptions in February. The airline emphasized disciplined capacity management and network optimization to protect profitability amid fuel price volatility.

feed.title: Aeroméxico March 2026 Traffic Results
feed.summary: Grupo Aeroméxico reports a 1.4% year-over-year decrease in passengers transported in March 2026, though total capacity (ASMs) increased by 1.0%. Despite localized disruptions, the airline achieved an 83.3% load factor, a 0.6 percentage point increase from March 2025, demonstrating resilience and effective capacity management in a challenging environment. The CEO highlighted continued focus on network optimization and revenue management to protect profitability amid fuel price volatility.

feed.title: American Financial posts Q1 results April 29, webcast follows
feed.summary: American Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: AFG) announced that it will release its 2026 first-quarter results after 5:00 p.m. ET on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Following the release, the company will host a conference call and webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 11:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Participants can register for the call via telephone or access the live broadcast and accompanying slides online.

feed.title: Leidos Holdings sector president sells $317k in stock
feed.summary: Elizabeth A. Porter, Sector President at Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS), sold 2,000 shares of common stock for approximately $317,555 under a pre-arranged trading plan. These sales occurred on April 7, 2026, with the stock currently trading down about 19% over the past six months and its market capitalization at $20.21 billion. Despite the sale, Porter still directly owns 49,476 shares, and InvestingPro analysis suggests the company appears undervalued.

feed.title: Statewide effort invites community to help provide meals for local families facing hunger
feed.summary: Walmart and Sam's Club, in collaboration with Feeding America and Hawaiʻi's local food banks, have launched their annual "Fight Hunger. Spark Change." campaign. This initiative aims to combat food insecurity in Hawaiʻi, where one in three households faces hunger, by providing various ways for customers to donate and support food banks statewide. Through product purchases, register donations, and online contributions, the campaign seeks to secure meals for local families, keiki, and kūpuna.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE: WSM) affiliate files sale of 1,419 RSU shares; prior 32,684 sale
feed.summary: An affiliate of Williams-Sonoma (NYSE: WSM) has filed to sell 1,419 shares of common stock, which were acquired as Restricted Stock Units on April 4, 2026. This filing, a Form 144, also details a previous sale of 32,684 shares by Jeff Howie on March 26, 2026, for $5,903,916.83. The current filing references April 8, 2026, and indicates the securities are to be sold on the NYSE.

feed.title: Chevron's CEO made $104 million while America bombed Iran
feed.summary: A Wall Street Journal investigation revealed that top U.S. oil and gas executives sold $1.4 billion worth of their company stock in the first three months of 2026, coinciding with the war in Iran. Chevron CEO Mike Wirth alone sold $104 million in shares, with $17.2 million of those sales lacking a prearranged trading plan, suggesting a deliberate decision to cash out during a wartime market spike. Critics link these insider transactions to political influence, noting similar patterns during the Russia-Ukraine conflict and highlighting how such actions disproportionately benefit a small group while the costs are borne by the broader public.

feed.title: ADPT (ADPT) insider Chad M. Robins sells blocks totaling six‑figure proceeds
feed.summary: Chad M. Robins, an insider at Adaptive Biotechnologies Corp (ADPT), has reported proposed and recent transactions involving the sale of common stock through a Form 144 SEC filing. The filing details multiple individual sales in February-April 2026, including significant transactions like 99,225 shares sold for $1,589,941.71 on February 27, 2026, and 96,323 shares for $1,546,542.82 on March 2, 2026. This Form 144 notice indicates routine affiliate dispositions by the selling holder, rather than commentary on company operations.

feed.title: Affiliate resale notice for ADPT (NASDAQ: ADPT) — 10,000 shares listed
feed.summary: An affiliate of Adaptive Biotechnologies Corp (ADPT) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed resale of 10,000 shares of common stock through Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, with an aggregate market value of $148,400. The filing specifies 153,981,561 shares outstanding as of April 8, 2026, and also details several recent dispositions by Harlan Robins. This routine notice informs the market of potential future sales, with the timing dependent on the holder's decisions and broker execution.

feed.title: ADP declares quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (ADP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share, marking its 27th consecutive year of dividend increases. The payment is scheduled for July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026. InvestingPro analysis indicates that ADP is currently undervalued, with the company maintaining a strong financial position and outperforming human capital management peers despite a year-to-date decline in stock value.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges ADMA Biologics, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADMA) Investors to Contact the Firm Regarding Ongoing Investigation
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is investigating potential claims against ADMA Biologics, Inc. following a report by Culper Research alleging that ADMA's reported growth is deceptive due to "channel stuffing" and an undisclosed related-party distributor. The stock experienced a significant drop after the report's publication. The law firm is encouraging investors who suffered losses to contact them to discuss their legal options.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) Trading Down 3.1% on Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) shares dipped 3.1% after Goldman Sachs and several other firms lowered their price targets, contributing to a sector-wide software pullback. Despite the analyst downgrades, ServiceNow reported a quarterly earnings beat and has positive catalysts such as AI partnerships and institutional buying. The company maintains a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, with a target price of $187.46, though insiders have recently sold shares.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) Trading Up 1.1% on Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) stock rose 1.1% after Guggenheim increased its price target to $244 and maintained a "buy" rating. Several other firms, including HSBC and Citi, also raised their price targets, contributing to a MarketBeat consensus of "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $237.57. Despite this positive analyst sentiment, company insiders sold approximately 30,142 shares worth about $7.36 million over the past three months, reducing insider ownership to 0.16%. The stock is trading above its 50-day and 200-day simple moving averages, with a market cap of $580.5 billion and a P/E ratio of 21.8.

feed.title: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) Trading Up 2.2% After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) stock rose 2.2% after Citigroup increased its price target from $42.00 to $48.00, though retaining a neutral rating. The increase comes despite recent disappointing quarterly results and concerns about rising operational and legal risks, including a cybersecurity incident and insider share sales. Analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average $57.41 price target, while institutional investors show mixed activity in PayPal shares.

feed.title: Shareholders back Cooper Companies (NYSE: COO) board, auditor and pay
feed.summary: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (COO) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on April 7, 2026, where shareholders approved all key proposals. This included the election of all nine director nominees, the ratification of KPMG LLP as the independent auditor for the fiscal year ending October 31, 2026, and the advisory approval of executive compensation. The results indicate strong shareholder support for the company's governance, audit firm, and executive pay practices.

feed.title: Charles River Labs (NYSE: CRL) CFO files Form 3 reporting zero stock ownership
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) CFO, Glenn Coleman, has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his beneficial ownership in the company. The filing indicates that Coleman holds 0 shares of Common Stock directly as of April 6, 2026. This Form 3 establishes a baseline for his ownership and does not signify any buying or selling activity.
